name: DeliSpace
short_description: Deliver packages... in space! Test your agility by navigating through different galaxies carrying diverse packages and upgrade your ship. Will you become the best courier in the universe?
detailed_description:
Gameplay Video

Check out this awesome gameplay video by Zahait to see what the rookie pilots can expect:
youtube . com / watch?v=bcf4zjVVgQ8


About the Game

A true test to your agility and maneuvering skills in this arcade style, physics based, 2D space sim. Deliver packages between planets avoiding various obstacles, upgrade your ship and progress through the galaxy uncovering new worlds and gameplay modifications.


Transport packages from one planet to another - a seemingly simple task, but what if the package contains a living, moving animal or food that needs to be delivered quickly enough? Each package modifies the gameplay slightly, forcing you to adapt to it.

For a job well done you will get a reward, and for a bad one your reputation on the planet will drop. You don't want to explain yourself to your boss when that happens.


Discover new planets and various threats. The further into the universe you go, the more dangers await you. Space debris, meteorites, interference, gravitational fields, signal loss.... Do you think you can handle them all?


Besides flying from planet to planet, special, challenging levels await you to test if you can handle specific package types. Prove yourself and expand the portfolio of package types you can deliver!


Not enough challenge? No problem! There are letters scattered throughout the levels. Are you clever enough to find your way to them? Are you brave enough to snatch those placed in peculiarly dangerous areas?



With work comes pay, and that pay is best spent on improving your precious ship. Select upgrades to best meet the dangers you will encounter on your way.
